'''√v-p-f''' ('''vapafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dearterialize|dearterialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dearterialize|dearterialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-p-f
|-
! Lemma
| vapafa
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || vapafithi || vapafiji || vapafishi || vapafi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || vapafuthuth || vapafujuj || vapafushush || vapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || vapafuthu || vapafuju || vapafushu || vapafu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || vapafufuth || vapafufuj || vapafufush || vapafuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || vapafethe || vapafeje || vapafeshe || vapafe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || vapafothoth || vapafojoj || vapafoshosh || vapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || vapafotho || vapafojo || vapafosho || vapafo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || vapafofoth || vapafofoj || vapafofosh || vapafof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vapafïf || vapafïf || vapafïf || vapafïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vapafïfïf || vapafïfïf || vapafïfïf || vapafïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vapafïf || vapafïf || vapafïf || vapafïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vapafïf || vapafïf || vapafïf || vapafïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || vapafæthæ || vapafæjæ || vapafæshæ || vapafæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vapafathath || vapafajaj || vapafashash || vapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vapafatha || vapafaja || vapafasha || vapafa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vapafafath || vapafafaj || vapafafash || vapafaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || vapafasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || govapafasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokivapafasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || vapafnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || govapafnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokivapafnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || vapafshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || govapafnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokivapafshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || vapafroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || govapafnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokivapafroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || vapafmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || govapafnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokivapafmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || vapafsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || govapafnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokivapafsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || vapafngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || govapafnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokivapafngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || vapafyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || govapafnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokivapafyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || vapafyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || govapafnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokivapafyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || vapafnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || govapafnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokivapafnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || vapafnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || govapafnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokivapafnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || vapafnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || govapafnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokivapafnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || vapafshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || govapafnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokivapafshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || vapafshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || govapafnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokivapafshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || vapafshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || govapafnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokivapafshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || vapafronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || govapafnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokivapafronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || vapafroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || govapafnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokivapafroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || vapafromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || govapafnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokivapafromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || vapafmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || govapafnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokivapafmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || vapafmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || govapafnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokivapafmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || vapafmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || govapafnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokivapafmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || vapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || væpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hovapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hovæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohovapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohovæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüvapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüvæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüvapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüvæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïvapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïvæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïvapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïvæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luvapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luvæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluvapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluvæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || livapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || livæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilivapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilivæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kovapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kovæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokovapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokovæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kevapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kevæpæf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekevapaf
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekevæpæf
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
